style_effects: Gentle sparkling dust trails drift upward like fairy lights, dissolving into iridescent petal-shaped aura particles that pulse softly with a pastel pink and lavender glow. A delicate, swirling aura of pale gold light surrounds Arbok, refracting through delicate, translucent wing-like ripples that shimmer with subtle musical note vibrations. The lighting mood is soft and dreamy, bathed in warm, gentle luminescence reminiscent of a moonlit garden. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
